note: This is the template. For each active TM create tm_{subsystem}_state.json by copying and filling in subsystem-specific values. Remove all _schema documentation objects before use — arrays must be empty at initialisation.

tool_registry_schema.note: Schema for objects in tool_registry. Not a real entry.
tool_registry_schema.tool_path: string — file path relative to repo root
tool_registry_schema.delivery_id: string — TDL message_id of the delivery
tool_registry_schema.mtm_notified: boolean — whether MTM was informed of this tool
tool_registry_schema.doc_path: string — path to documentation or empty string

open_request_schema.note: Schema for objects in open_requests. Not a real entry.
open_request_schema.blocking_tasks: array of strings — task_ids blocked until delivered
